summary: Frontend-only testing of PropManage v2 redesign (Phases 0-4): design system playground, dashboards (client+specialist), public marketplace, login, and BRAND NEW Community zone. All 6 critical flows PASS. 28/28 expected data-testid attributes located. Community public access shows hero + 4 category tabs with counts + 3 forum topics + 2 pinned FAQ items. Community authenticated flow (client@propmanage.io): create-topic modal opens, topic posted (TEST_topic_iter62_v2 visible), reply posted (TEST_reply_iter62_v2 visible, replies count=3), like toggle increments to 1. Backend community endpoints (/api/community/stats, /api/community/topics) return 200 — no regression. Existing TierGate, QuestPanel, TierCelebrationBanner, VoucherExpiryAlert all still mounted (visible in screenshots).
critical_code_review_comments: Guided onboarding tour (TUR GHIDAT) overlays the dashboard immediately after login and intercepts all clicks until dismissed. Currently the skip button ("Sari peste · Mai târziu") works, but the tour overlay also lacks a data-testid (e.g., tour-skip, tour-modal) — recommend adding for future automated tests.

CommunityPage public visitors see 'Alătură-te' CTA correctly hiding the [community-new-topic] button — verified behavior is correct but consider adding [data-testid=community-join-cta] on the public-only 'Alătură-te' link for symmetry.

Specialist Dashboard initial viewport lands on 'Quest-uri & Recompense' content before opportunity cards — accept-{id} / mine-{id} buttons require scroll to be visible. Not a bug, just observation: opportunities live below QuestPanel by design.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_ community topic ('TEST_topic_iter62_v2') and 1 TEST_ reply ('TEST_reply_iter62_v2') by client@propmanage.io. Liked the topic once. No cleanup endpoint used — main agent can leave these as community demo content or purge from DB if undesired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PropManage v2 redesign Phases 0-4 are fully functional. Design system tokens (pm-card, pm-stat, pm-pill, pm-chip, pm-fab) propagated across Marketplace/Login/SpecialistDashboard/ClientDashboard/Community. Community zone fully working end-to-end (public read + authenticated create/reply/like). Phases 5-6 (Settings, Admin sync) intentionally deferred and not tested. NOTE: guided onboarding tour intercepts modal/button clicks on first session — must dismiss via 'Sari peste' text-locator before testing dashboard CTAs (no data-testid on tour skip). Specialist VERIFIED so verify-banner & upload-docs-cta are correctly absent.
verified_flows: /components-v2 playground renders: hero card (pm-card) + 3 bento stats (pm-stat) + 10 pm-pill buttons + 8 pm-chip variants + FAB + empty state
/login submit button class='pm-pill pm-pill-primary pm-pill-lg w-full disabled:opacity-50' (lime)
/marketplace public renders hero 'Specialiști verificați' with chip 'MARKETPLACE PROPMANAGE', mkt-cat + mkt-verified + mkt-sort filters, 100 cards with mkt-card-{id} testids

/community PUBLIC: hero 'COMUNITATE PROPMANAGE · Întreabă. Învață. Conectează. · 6 subiecte · 1 răspunsuri' + 4 tabs (Forum 3 subiecte / Grupuri 1 / Întrebări frecvente 2 / Recenzii 0). Forum tab shows 3 topics, FAQ tab shows 2 pinned topics (Fixat badge). [community-new-topic] correctly absent for anonymous visitors (replaced with 'Alătură-te' CTA)

/community AUTH (client logged in): [community-new-topic] visible → opens [community-create-modal] with [community-create-category]+[community-create-title]+[community-create-body]+[community-create-submit] → posted topic visible immediately, topics count went from 3→4 in Forum

Community topic detail modal: clicking topic opens [community-topic-modal] with [community-reply-input]+[community-reply-submit]+[community-like-topic]. Reply posted appears in replies list (count=3, text visible). Like toggle increments counter to 1.

Client Dashboard (/client): hero text 'Ai nevoie de un specialist?' + 'Solicită serviciu' pill button rendered. 16 pm-stat instances (stats + QuestPanel + TierCelebrationBanner). pm-card hero+other cards present.

Specialist Dashboard (/specialist): all 4 PMStatCards (spec-stat-wallet, spec-stat-rating, spec-stat-active, spec-stat-tier) ✓. spec-search ✓, spec-urgent-toggle ✓. Bottom nav with 4 tabs (Oportunități / Lucrările mele / Notificări / Setări).
Cookie GDPR banner (data-testid='cookie-banner') visible at first visit on public pages ✓
Backend community endpoints unchanged: GET /api/community/stats → 200, GET /api/community/topics → 200 with proper category/author/replies_count/likes_count/pinned fields
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found. One minor environmental note: guided onboarding tour (TUR GHIDAT) for first-time sessions overlays dashboards and intercepts clicks — easily dismissed via 'Sari peste' button. This is expected onboarding UX behavior, not a bug.
